title: phlox × henryae
intro: Phlox × henryae, also known as Henry's Phlox, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the family Polemoniaceae, which is a flowering perennial plant native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phlox × henryae include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Phlox × henryae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
